title: Champasak Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Champasak with a Z-Score of +3.69. This is a critical event with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 74%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is at 16.2 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
